title: Registry Identity, SBOM, Provenance, Attestations, and Promotion
description: A release promotes a mutable tag, rebuilds for production, stores an SBOM separately from the image, generates provenance with leaked build args, and never verifies attestations downstream. Learners cumulatively produce attested image release record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Generate human-readable tags while binding promotion, deployment, rollback, and evidence to one registry digest.
Generate image SBOM and max-appropriate provenance, identify builder, source, inputs, subject digest, limits, and registry attachment.
Use actions/attest with least permissions and exact subject path or digest while recognizing plan, repository visibility, and registry constraints.
